name: Michiko Tendou

name: Nemu Manaka

Her demeanor and candor, however, are condescending and intolerably insulting. Despite being classmates with Keisuke and [Kanae](https://anilist.co/character/54181), she has hardly ever interacted with them. name: Niina Sugawara
description: Kazusa's friend, a melancholic girl who the guys call a "crane" because of her fragile beauty. Initially, Niina ignores the boys because of a harassment experience in her childhood but gradually begins to develop feelings for Izumi because of his caring and kindness. Thus, her loyalty to her friend and their common love of one boy quickly becomes one of the main conflicts of the story.

name: Rei Kashino
description: An extroverted playboy, Rei rides motorcycles in a professional circuit. He only entered high school because he made a deal with his father that if he did he could move out of the house. He and his father do not get along. He had a twin brother, Sei, who committed suicide the day before their birthday.

name: Sora
description: The Astil Manuscript or Sora, as affectionately named by Arata, is a legendary grimoire said to contain information about another world. Originally belonging to Hijiri, Sora has since contracted with Arata, supporting and protecting him after becoming a magus.
mediaTitles: Trinity Seven: Eternal Library & Alchemic Girl

name: Sorawo Kamikoshi
description: Sorawo is a shy, introverted person who usually prefers to be alone, not wanting to be bothered, and often keeps her distance from other people. There had been a time where she tried to make friends during her early years in university, attending a few parties, but in the end, she couldn't keep up, and it was too exhausting for her, so she decided to be on her own instead. When forced into a conversation or meeting people for the first time, she tends to end up flustered or talk excessively.

name: Togusa
description: Togusa is the newest member of Section 9 and the only one not originally recruited from Kusanagi's team of SpecOps. Recruited from the regular police forces, Detective Togusa (no first name is yet known) has only the most basic of augmentation and no cyberization outside of his cyberbrain. The Major wanted him for his perspective as a real policeman and as an outside opinion so as to avoid intellectual incest within Section 9. name: Ami Asai
description: Ami Asai is Shinichi's coworker and [Mr. Asai](https://anilist.co/character/169505/Akihiko-Asai)'s daughter. She has medium length hair and wears glasses. Ami enjoys "people watching" and ogling attractive males, and she has a fond interest in watching the interactions between [Shinichi](https://anilist.co/character/130664/Shinichi-Sakurai) and [Hana](https://anilist.co/character/130665/Hana-Uzaki). Ami hopes to see Shinichi and Hana enter a relationship, although Ami herself seems to find Shini

name: Aru Rikuhachima
description: Aru is a 2nd year student from Gehenna Academy and she wields a Sniper Rifle as her weapon of choice. She is the self-proclaimed leader and a member of the Club Problem Solver 68.

name: Chisa Yukizome
description: __Height:__ 161 cm (5'3") __Talent:__ Ultimate Housekeeper She was later Class 77-B's homeroom teacher, and then the Future Foundation's Branch 5 Office Director responsible for the inquiry and secret intelligence regarding Despair. She, along with the other Future Foundation Directors, is forced to participate in the Final Killing Game.

name: Fudou Nomura
description: Nomura is a pacifist by nature, but his freedom-loving ideals as well as his cheeky attitude often finds himself rebelling against figures of power and authority. Ultimately, though, he’s a relatively laid-back guy with a cheerful demeanor. Nomura was originally a talented user of the Jigen-ryū school of Japanese swordsmanship; however, due to extremely harsh and rushed training enforced by his former master, his body was broken beyond repair, which made him incapable of picking up a sword ever

name: Hachirota Hoshino
description: Hachirota Hoshino is the protagonist of the series. Everyone simply calls him "Hachi" (Japanese for "eight" or "eighth") or "Hachimaki" ([ハチマキ, "Headband"], because he wears one during his EVAs). His dream has always been to own his own spaceship, but between the cost of purchasing one and his low-paying, seemingly dead-end job, Hachi struggles with even deciding whether or not to pursue his dream. Hachi's father is a renowned engineer, a source of much ambivalence to Hachimaki. Much of Hachi's

name: Hime Arikawa
description: He is a young boy at Shimoshina High School who is forced to dress to pay off his creditors after the student council save him from the debt collectors. (Source: Himegoto Wiki)

name: Joo-Heon Seo
description: After getting betrayed by his own boss who feared his rising power and sent to a death mission, he gets help from a strange relic which sends him 15 years back in time, when tombs just started appearing.

name: Kira Yamato
description: __Genetic type:__ Ultimate Coordinator __Height:__ 165 cm [GS], 170 cm [GSD], 175 cm [GSmovie] __Rank:__ Ensign [GS], ~! Admiral [GSD], White Coat (ZAFT) [GSDSE/FP] !~ Kira is a young boy living on the neutral colony, Heliopolis, during the Bloody Valentine War before it was attacked by ZAFT. Due to this attack and his wish to protect his friends, Kira becomes the pilot of the GAT-X105 Strike Gundam.

name: Leeron Littner
nativeName: リーロン・リットナー
description: Leeron, or "Ron," is the flamboyant village mechanic of Littner Village. After taking an interest in Simon's mech they join Simon, Kamina and Yoko in their quest to defeat the Beastmen.

Mahiru is optimistic, sensible, and unafraid to speak her mind. She's a reliable person who is prone to taking care of people, but won't hesitate to scold them either. name: Mei Kusakabe
description: Mei is Satsuki's younger sister; she is 4 years old. She is the first person that meets and befriends Totoro. Believing her mother's condition has worsened, she sets off on foot to the hospital and gets lost.

name: Mewtwo
description: Mewtwo is a Pokémon created by science. Mewtwo was created after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments based on Mew. It is said to have the most savage heart among all Pokémon, lack compassion, and strike fear into its enemy with cold, glowing eyes. Because it was engineered to be the ultimate in battle, it can only think of defeating its foes. name: Mister Satan
description: His name in the original Japanese version media is Mister Satan. It was changed to Hercule in FUNimation's English dub and Viz Media English version of the manga. In the U.S. edition of Shonen Jump it is explained that Hercule is the real name of the character while Mr. Satan was his stage name though no such explanation was present in the original. name: Monomi
description: Usami is a rabbit magical girl who features as the mascot character of Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair, appearing in the game as the lead teacher of the school trip. After being assaulted by Monokuma, Usami's appearance is forcibly changed to greater resemble him, with Monokuma renaming her Monomi as a result.
